All right, welcome to ClickFunnels. We are going to be going over your membership area. So if you have portals that you are giving access to your members, so they can do workouts and nutrition accountability, that means that they are signing up for an account with the link that you are providing them. Once they sign up for an account, you can manage them and you can delete them and see how much they've done. So that's exactly what I'm going to show you how to do. So we are inside of our 42-day detox funnel where we have a lot of members that have signed up. And we want to take a look at them. So you're going to click on membership area right here. And this kind of breaks down all of the lessons and you are going to take a look at a top right corner where it says members and you're going to click on that. Once you click on that, it is going to show you all of your members and it will always start with the most recent people that have signed up for your portal. So these people, they don't have very much done because they just signed up and they haven't viewed much, but this is something that you can definitely use to hold your clients accountable because they should be viewing the videos and completing them in the portal. So that is all we want to show you. You can keep scrolling and go to farther pages and usually as you go farther back, you'll have higher view times, but there's so much content in here that is really hard to get to like 100% completion because I mean, they'd have to watch all of the supplement videos and the dosing and all of that stuff. So you can do a more granular look if you click on the 21% and you can see what they've watched if your plan allows for that. So you can basically see when they completed it. I just clicked into the first one, which is welcome to the challenge and it was a seven minute and 30 second video and they completed all of it, okay? And they watched all of these videos and how long they were and so you can go all the way through and it tells you how many videos you have in there and what they've watched. So this is absolutely great for holding your clients accountable. If you need to, you can delete them just by hitting the members area and you can hit delete, okay? If you delete it for them, then they are no longer in the membership portal and their username and password will not work. So that's all you really have to do. Here is view how much they have watched and what they've watched and you can use that to hold them accountable and then if you need to get somebody out, maybe that canceled their membership or canceled their challenge, you just go in here, you can search for their name and you can click on the status and just click on delete and they are no longer in your funnel.
